1.description: Triage step 2: recommend an assignment group by majority vote across the scored neighbour candidates produced by check_duplicate_candidates, falling back to an LLM tiebreak/propose when the vote is inconclusive. Consumes `candidates` (data-flow bound from step 1). Read-only — recommends, never writes.

parameters.description: Scored neighbour candidates from check_duplicate_candidates (data-flow bound). Each is a ScoredNeighbour dict.
parameters.name: candidates

parameters.description: Optional probe text used only on the LLM tiebreak path when the majority vote is inconclusive.
parameters.name: probe_text

parameters.description: Optional source ticket row used only on the LLM tiebreak path.
parameters.name: ticket_row
